name: Troy Carter
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $181,387 for Troy Carter in U.S. House, LA-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
